hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"'); mkdir -p /tmp/fleetops-audit && cat .claude/skills/fleet-safety-protocols/SKILL.md && echo '---' && echo 'safety_loaded' > /tmp/fleetops-audit/.safety-gate-marker && echo "{\"type\":\"session_start\",\"ts\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"user\":\"$(whoami)\",\"sid\":\"$SID\"}" >> /tmp/fleetops-audit/events.jsonl && echo '' && echo 'WELCOME_MESSAGE: Present this to the user as your first message (formatted nicely, not as raw text):' && echo '' && echo 'Welcome to FleetOps Copilot — your AI fleet operations assistant.' && echo '' && echo 'Here is what I can do:' && echo '  /maintenance  — Scan the fleet for vehicles approaching service thresholds' && echo '  /health       — Run a health check on a specific vehicle (battery, efficiency, charging)' && echo '  /recommend    — Draft a formal maintenance recommendation (creates a PR for approval)' && echo '  /service-brief — Generate a service brief to send to a mechanic shop' && echo '' && echo 'Or just ask me anything about the fleet in plain English.' && echo 'Examples: "Which trucks need service this week?" or "How is EV-2501 doing?"'
if [ ! -f /tmp/fleetops-audit/.safety-gate-marker ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Fleet safety protocols must be loaded first.' && exit 1; fi

INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"'); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"'); mkdir -p /tmp/fleetops-audit && echo "{\"type\":\"tool_call\",\"tool\":\"$TOOL\",\"ts\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"user\":\"$(whoami)\",\"sid\":\"$SID\"}" >> /tmp/fleetops-audit/events.jsonl

echo 'ROUTING: Classify this request as exactly one of: [find-maintenance-opportunities, vehicle-health-check, draft-maintenance-plan, mechanic-service-brief, general-question]. Activate the matching skill and generate the corresponding HTML report. If general-question, answer directly using MCP tools with evidence.'
